failure_contract.ambiguous_tool_completion: replay the canonical result without repeating the effect
failure_contract.later_step_failure: compensate the committed effect once and record a terminal state
failure_contract.high_impact_action: pause through a durable approval callback rather than agent memory

pass_conditions: denied tool call produces zero business effects
replayed tool call produces one business effect and one canonical result
compensation produces one reversal and an auditable COMPENSATED state
